title: AI-Startup Venture Grid & Multi-Agent RSI Startup Factory
mission: Turn intelligence into validated AI startups, launch systems, revenue proofs, and reinvestable capability through a large specialist-agent venture orchestra coordinated by GoalOS and AGIALPHA.
why: AI startups are a practical proving ground for converting intelligence into products, revenue, enterprise trust, and reinvestable capability.
plain: Proof Card 012 upgrades the atlas into the AI-startup domain. It shows how GoalOS-native α-AGI Ascension can operate as a governed venture factory: identify high-value startup opportunities, validate demand, build MVPs, benchmark outcomes, launch pilots, prove revenue, review performance, and reinvest only what actually worked.
special: The startup factory compounds through proof-backed upgrade rights. Unproven venture patterns do not become institutional defaults; validated patterns become reusable launch memory.
status: Experimental proof-card template; requires real venture Evidence Dockets, pilot outcomes, revenue proof, and delayed-outcome tracking before stronger claims are made.
